RequestBody.name: SDK Test Agent - Functions
RequestBody.instructions: You are a weather bot. Use the provided function to help answer questions about weather.

function.name: getCurrentWeatherAtLocation
function.description: Return the array describing weather for each location, provided as a string array. The order of output array is the same as in input.

locations.description: The cities to get the weather for.

text.value:
J. Doe, here is the current weather for your requested locations:

- Alpine: Cloudy
- Baird: Sunny
- Frankfort: Rainy

If you need further details such as temperature or forecasts, please let me know!
What is the weather in Alpine, Baird and Frankfort.
